title: Dragon Wings
description: This mod adds dragon wing models to the player's back.
body:
This mod is based on [WingsModCosmetic](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/wingsmod), with some modifications made from the original. The color adjustment and interface have been removed.

The mod adds the default Ender Dragon wing texture to the player's back, and the developer has reserved extensions in the source code, which means that you only need to draw the wing texture according to the original template, fill in the texture path and ID in the type, and the corresponding wings can be generated.
